title: Where & When Was Piggy?
description: Look at a Piggy photo and guess both where it was taken and when the memory happened.
futureGameplay: Show one photo, multiple-choice locations, and multiple-choice dates. Reveal the correct answer and a short fun fact.

title: Guess the Pork
description: Drag each answer label onto the correct zoomed-in Piggy image.
futureGameplay: Match zoomed-in Piggy photos with labels such as Nose, Eyes, Butt, Paw, Ears, Mouth, and Mustache.

title: Porky’s Fashion Police
description: Look at Porky’s outfits, choose the best matching funny title, and prove you understand elite cat fashion.
futureGameplay: Play 12 rounds of Porky outfit photos and choose the best matching fashion title.

title: Piggy Memory Match
description: Flip the cards, find all the matching Piggy pairs, and prove your memory is sharper than Porky’s snack radar.
futureGameplay: Match 10 duplicated Piggy photos into pairs while tracking moves, time, and best score.

title: Feed Porky
description: Drag food to Porky and discover whether he loves it, tolerates it, or files an official complaint.
futureGameplay: Feed Porky 10 foods, trigger happy or angry reactions, and sort the loved foods from the rejected ones.

title: Who Scared Piggy?
description: Guess which people, pets, places, and suspicious objects make Porky panic — and which ones he can tolerate.
futureGameplay: Answer 12 fear-or-fine rounds and learn what makes Porky run, judge, or relax.

title: Bedtime Piggy
description: Complete Porky’s highly demanding bedtime routine and help the household food beggar finally fall asleep.
futureGameplay: Dim the lights, prepare the bed, choose the blanket, pick the snack, give goodnight pets, and watch Porky fall asleep.

title: Find Piggy
description: There are multiple Piggies hidden in one scene. Click every Piggy you can find before time runs out.
futureGameplay: Find all 8 hidden Piggies in one scene using manually configured target areas.

title: Piggy Puzzler
description: Put Porky back together one piece at a time and prove you understand the true shape of maximum fluff.
futureGameplay: Choose a Piggy photo and rebuild it from shuffled jigsaw-style pieces across easy, medium, and hard grids.

title: Catch the Treat
description: Help Porky catch his favourite foods while avoiding the terrible things someone keeps throwing at him.
futureGameplay: Move Porky left and right to catch good foods, avoid bad foods, build combos, and protect all three lives.

title: Piggy Whack-a-Paw
description: Tap Porky’s paws when they pop up, avoid the suspicious objects, and survive the fastest household paw attack.
futureGameplay: Whack good paw targets, avoid hazards, build combos, protect lives, and chase a high score.

title: Piggy Treat Sort
description: Sort Porky’s favourite snacks from the suspicious foods before he files a complaint with management.
futureGameplay: Drag or click food items into Piggy Approved and Piggy Says No bowls, use hints, and protect Porky’s menu score.

title: Piggy Photo Quiz
description: Answer fun questions about Piggy using his real photos and memories.
futureGameplay: Ask easy multiple-choice questions about his outfits, favourite foods, hiding spots, habits, and funny moments.

title: Piggy Mood Match
description: Look at Piggy’s expression and guess his mood.
futureGameplay: Use real photos and answers such as hungry, sleepy, scared, angry, curious, or judging everyone.
